session.user:
Run the following command and report results: make fast-ci
This runs all fast CI checks (unit tests, linting, type checking). Report any failures in detail.
session.assistant: I'll execute the fast CI checks for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI checks (unit tests, linting, type checking)

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1

--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1695 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- FAIL: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it.
--- ty ---
... [117 lines omitted] ...
=============================== warnings summary =============================== /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/test_json_command.py:16: DeprecationWarning: 'BaseCommand' is deprecated and will be removed in Click 9.0. Use 'Command' instead. -- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html 6008 passed, 2 warnings in 25.24s
session.assistant:
make fast-ci failed: 1 issue found
**Formatting Issues:**
1. **Prettier formatting**: 2 files need formatting - docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md - docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md
2. **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date - Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate it
**Summary of Results:**
- Lint: PASSED - Format Check: PASSED (1695 files) - Type Checking (ty): PASSED - Unit Tests (erk): 6008 passed, 2 warnings - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 31 passed
The test suites passed successfully, but the build failed due to: 1. Two markdown files that need Prettier formatting 2. An out-of-date exec reference documentation file that needs regeneration
